MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: N. Bautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Lillian Kwok, is present. Represented by Channell Wasson
Attorney, F. Sharree Hess, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Pietro Hiduk, is present.
Attorney, Philip Keith , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-07-2011 is vacated.
